metrics.effort_pass_rate: mean trial_pass for a task/model/reasoning-effort cell
metrics.effort_score: mean trial_score for a task/model/reasoning-effort cell
metrics.final_pass_rate: pass rate from the selected best-score reasoning effort
metrics.final_score: best effort_score over evaluated reasoning efforts
metrics.trial_pass: true iff all blocker criteria pass
metrics.trial_score: weighted average of criterion scores, including failed trials
